name: Meridia Community
description_short: Meridia Community Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, and investment services with a focus on financial wellness and community support.
description_long:
Meridia Community Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving customers in the Buffalo area. The organization emphasizes a community-focused approach with their motto "Go Beyond," positioning themselves as an alternative to traditional for-profit banks. Their routing number is 222380731, indicating NCUA insurance coverage for member deposits.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of financial products including checking accounts (Checking, Checking Plus) with rewards debit cards, multiple savings vehicles (Primary Share, Regular Savings, Club Savings, IRA Accounts, Money Market Accounts, Term Share Certificates, and Youth Savings), and an extensive loan portfolio. Loan products span auto and vehicle financing (auto loans, equipment loans, powersports loans, RV loans), home lending (first mortgages, home equity loans and lines of credit), and unsecured options (personal loans, credit cards, personal lines of credit, share-secured loans). They also provide supplementary services including bill pay, direct deposit, wire transfers, notary services, foreign currency exchange, and financial advisory services through LPL Financial Services.

Meridia distinguishes itself through commitment to member financial wellbeing, zero-fee checking account offerings, community involvement initiatives, and youth savings programs. They emphasize the credit union difference compared to traditional banking and provide digital banking platforms (GoOnline, GoMobile, GoAudio). The institution maintains physical presence through multiple locations with CO-OP shared branch access and maintains an active ATM network.

As a credit union, Meridia operates under NCUA oversight and member-governance principles rather than shareholder profit maximization. Their competitive rates (auto loans from 3.49% APR, term certificates up to 3.09% APY, credit cards from 9.99% APR as of April 2026) and emphasis on financial education suggest positioning as a community-centered alternative to traditional banking.
services: Savings accounts (Primary Share, Regular Savings, Club Savings, Youth Savings)
IRA Accounts and Money Market Accounts
Auto Loans, Equipment Loans, Powersport Loans, and RV Loans
First Mortgages and Home Equity Loans/Lines of Credit
Share-Secured Loans and Personal Lines of Credit
CO-OP Shared Branch and ATM network access
LPL Financial Services and investment advisory
pros: No-fee checking account with no stipulations or hassles
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 3.49% APR
Comprehensive loan portfolio including auto, home, equipment, powersport, and RV financing
Multiple savings account options including youth savings and club savings accounts
CO-OP Shared Branch network access for extended service availability
Investment services through LPL Financial Services partnership
Digital banking platforms including GoOnline, GoMobile, and GoAudio
cons: Geographic limitation to Buffalo area membership and branch locations
Limited information provided on website regarding membership eligibility requirements
No transparent fee schedule displayed on homepage (must navigate to specific account pages)
Website content outdated (references Internet Explorer 10 compatibility and shows April 2026 rates)
best_for: Buffalo-area residents seeking member-owned financial institution with community focus
Borrowers qualifying for auto, home, or equipment financing with competitive rates
Individuals wanting zero-fee checking with rewards debit card benefits
Young savers looking for youth-specific savings programs and financial education
diagnosis: Meridia Community Credit Union is best for Buffalo-area residents seeking a member-owned alternative to traditional banking with competitive rates, zero-fee checking, and community-focused financial services. Primary caveat is geographic membership limitation to the Buffalo region, making this unsuitable for customers outside their service area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
